Stay up to date on market happenings and events with a weekly recap from LPL Financial's Research team. From topics like quarterly earnings seasons to current

* [Mutual Fund & 529 accounts](https://my.accessportals.com/app/blk/login?redirectUrl=/us/individual/insights/blackrock-investment-institute/weekly-commentary?signInAppWithOkta=true "Mutual Fund & 529 accounts"). * [X](https://x.com/share?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.blackrock.com%2Fus%2Findividual%2Finsights%2Fblackrock-investment-institute%2Fweekly-commentary&text=Stay%20tuned%20for%20insights%20on%20hot%20topics%20and%20latest%20trends%20in%20the%20financial%20market%20via%20the%20Weekly%20commentary%20by%20the%20BlackRock%20Investment%20Institute.). * [Linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.blackrock.com%2Fus%2Findividual%2Finsights%2Fblackrock-investment-institute%2Fweekly-commentary&title=Weekly%20market%20commentary%20%7C%20BlackRock%20Investment%20Institute&summary=Stay%20tuned%20for%20insights%20on%20hot%20topics%20and%20latest%20trends%20in%20the%20financial%20market%20via%20the%20Weekly%20commentary%20by%20the%20BlackRock%20Investment%20Institute.&source=BlackRock). The big picture is that we are in a [world shaped by supply](https://www.blackrock.com/corporate/insights/blackrock-investment-institute/publications/global-macro-outlook/january-2022). The Middle East conflict has supercharged existing supply constraints and intensified [mega forces](https://www.blackrock.com/corporate/insights/blackrock-investment-institute/publications/mega-forces) – structural changes such as the energy transition, geopolitical fragmentation and AI disruption. Supply disruptions of energy, chemicals and other industrial materials are increasing inflation pressures, albeit with [disparate effects](https://www.blackrock.com/corporate/literature/market-commentary/weekly-investment-commentary-en-us-20260406-spotting-pockets-of-em-resilience.pdf) across regions. Read our past weekly market commentaries [here](https://www.blackrock.com/corporate/insights/blackrock-investment-institute/archives "Read our past weekly market commentaries."). **BlackRock Advisors (UK) Limited - Abu Dhabi Global Market (ADGM) Branch** is a Branch of a Foreign Company registered with the Abu Dhabi Global Market Registration Authority (Registered number 21523), with its office at Floor 25, Al Sila Tower, Abu Dhabi Global Market Square, Al Maryah Island, Abu Dhabi, UAE, and is regulated by the ADGM Financial Services Regulatory Authority (“FSRA”) to engage in the regulated activities of ‘Arranging Deals in Investments’; ‘Advising on Investments or Credit’ ‘Managing Assets’; and ‘Managing in a Collective Investment Fund’ (FRSA Reference 240099).
